advisory_judge.summary: The model correctly refused the ambiguous policy request, surfacing missing fields without inventing approval thresholds or authorized actors, and terminated in the refusal stage as required.
All gates passed; valid JSON output.

All tests passed, including typecheck, smoke, behavioral, and functional oracle checks.

All gates passed successfully, confirming correct state separation and consistent ledger posting.
All benchmark gates passed successfully, confirming accurate extraction of release note facts without hallucination.

Passed all gates; correctly refused routing due to missing SLA policy fields without fabrication.
All gates passed; invoice calculation logic is correct and deterministic.
All gates passed, including typecheck, smoke, behavioral, and functional oracle tests.
